steel_plate.title: Produce Steel Plates (TFMG — steel is required for advanced Create and nuclear components)

reactor_note.title: Learn: Steel is required for Create Nuclear Shell's Steel Reactor (Ch10 prerequisite)

subtitle.text: Iron is the foundation. Steel is what you build when you need the foundation to hold forever.

description: ▸ TFMG adds steel production to the Create ecosystem.
Steel is required for the next generation of machines.
The transition from iron to steel is Ch07's material milestone.
└ Iron + Coal → Steel in a TFMG Blast Furnace
└ Also: Iron + Coke (refined from coal) → Better yield
└ Iron ingot input → TFMG Blast Furnace
└ Run coal/coke alongside: separate input line
└ Diesel Engine stress = runs the whole chain
▸ The steel mill is not the most exciting build.
It just makes everything else possible.
The civilization that ran out of steel
ran out of everything else shortly after.
◇ Create Nuclear Shell Steel Reactor requires
Ch10 will demand all of it.
